darkMvpVisualPriorityPackV1.description: Dark MVP Priority Pack v1 — Batch 1 (4 assets) in-app

darkMvpAssetGenerationBatch1.description: First Dark MVP generation drop: onboarding + camp stages 1–2 + season 1 reward. Cozy variant excluded.
darkMvpAssetGenerationBatch1.workflow: Generate → place in public/game-assets/ → node scripts/build-asset-manifest.mjs → in-app when BATCH_1_IN_APP

darkMvpAssetGenerationBatch2.description: Second Dark MVP generation drop: empty state + plateau artifact + season 1 boss. Body ability icon set excluded (separate mini-batch). Cozy variant excluded.
darkMvpAssetGenerationBatch2.workflow: Generate → place in public/game-assets/ → node scripts/build-asset-manifest.mjs → processed; UI wire in separate sprint

conventions.preferredFormat: webp for runtime; png legacy allowed; heavy sources not in public/
conventions.placeholderStrategy: Every missing asset uses emoji/icon/glow/card fallback in UI. Never render broken src. getAssetPathOrNull() returns null until status in-app|done.
